specs.dimensions: Varies by size — NAP-35: 71"W × 35"D × 29"H; NAP-36 (8-ft racetrack): 95"W × 44"D × 29"H; NAP-38: 144"W × 48"D × 29"H
specs.materials: Engineered wood top with laminate finish, 3mm PVC tri-groove edge banding
key_features: 3mm PVC edge with tri-groove damage-resistance pattern
Available in multiple sizes (4-seat to large boardroom)
specs.notes: Confirmed Napa is an Office Star line, not Global. Per-size dimensions on retailer pages (Newmarket Office Furniture, National Business Furniture) — verify exact BBI SKU.
specs.who_its_for: This commercial conference table is a strong fit for municipalities, school boards, and professional services firms that need a polished boardroom table — available from a 42" round to a 12-foot racetrack.
